Package org.rodinp.keyboard.ui

Class RodinKeyboardUIPlugin

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.core.runtime.Plugin
org.eclipse.ui.plugin.AbstractUIPlugin
org.rodinp.keyboard.ui.RodinKeyboardUIPlugin
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.osgi.framework.BundleActivator
public class RodinKeyboardUIPlugin extends org.eclipse.ui.plugin.AbstractUIPlugin
The activator class controls the plug-in life cycle

    • getRodinModifyListener

      public org.eclipse.swt.events.ModifyListener getRodinModifyListener()

    • enableRodinModifyListener

      public void enableRodinModifyListener(boolean enable)
      Method to enable or disable listening by the keyboard modify listener.
      Parameters:
      enable - true to enable modifications listening, false to deactivate listening
      Since:
      1.1

    • createRodinModifyListener

      public org.eclipse.swt.events.ModifyListener createRodinModifyListener()

    • translate

      public String translate(String text)

    • translate

      public String translate(String text, int caretOffset)
      Returns the given string where symbols have been translated.
      Parameters:
      text - the text to translate symbols from
      caretOffset - the offset of the caret in the text
      Returns:
      the text where symbols (both mathematical and textual) have been translated
      Since:
      2.4

    • ensureMathFontIsAvailable

      public void ensureMathFontIsAvailable()
      Ensures that the default mathematical font of the Rodin platform is available to UI plug-ins. This method must be called within a UI Thread.
      Since:
      2.1
